_comment: MCP servers to wire up when this stack is selected. githarness init merges this into the project's .mcp.json. The project then consumes these servers at session start.
_why: awslabs.aws-iac-mcp-server gives the session live access to current CDK / CloudFormation documentation, samples, and best-practices — which go stale fast and cannot be frozen into a skill file. Pairing the stack skills with this MCP means the session reads the principle (skill) and queries the latest API (MCP) together.
